Proven Success

Real Transformation Stories

Industry leaders rely on Harezm's strategic expertise to automate and standardize complex SAP finance operations on a global scale.

Defense Industry / Aselsan
S/4HANA IFRS TRANSFORMATION

Fully Compliant IFRS Reporting with UMS11/UMS21 Standards

Details of migrating complex production processes to IFRS standards, Material Ledger implementation, and statutory inventory revaluation project at Turkey's largest defense company.

Pharmaceuticals / Pfizer
GLOBAL ROLLOUT

Successful SAP Template Rollout and Localization in 5 Countries

Aligning the core template with local regulations in Turkey, Romania, Italy, Croatia, and Brazil, standardizing Profitability Analysis and Material Ledger globally.

Other Brands We Partner With

AAK Group (Unipro), Abalioglu Tekstil, Actega, Al Marai Poultry, Anadolu Isuzu, Antonio Carraro, Aselsan, ASM, Bahcesehir University, Borcelik, Boyner, Ceyo, CSA Holding, Della Gida, Dentas Paper, Eczacibasi (Evyap), Efes, Fagor Industrial, Ferrero, Hapimag, Hayat Holding, Hero Food, IDO, Lila Kagit, Medyasoft, Nuh Beton & Cimento, Pakpen, Pfizer, Philip Morris, Sarkuysan, Sarsilmaz, SEDAS, Targe Electronic, TEMSA Global, TSKB, UCB Pharma, Ulker, Varrac, Wavin, Yapi Kredi Sigorta.
